calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Unruh for and with Ann Lane. Reverend Michael Roncelli also present.

Ms. Lane explained that she went to City Hall a few days after the ceremony to obtain a marriage license and that language on the form indicates that you cannot obtain a license unless you are currently not married. Mr. Unruh presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the Court having authority to approve the petition without a marriage license. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Continued To Apr-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ann Lane in Propria Persona. David Bruce in Propria Persona.

The Parties explained circumstances. The Court explained that it could not grant the petition without a marriage license, suggested the Parties get a hold of the person who officiated the ceremony, go to City Hall and put forth their best efforts. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was continued to April 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
